flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lehigh University rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($33.8k → $38.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lehigh University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($57.5k → $65.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lehigh University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Lehigh University are 79% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($105.6k vs $59.0k).
